sections.paragraph:
once part. pl. נֹגְנִים Psa 68:26. Elsewhere-

Piel נִגֵּן to strike strings, to play on a stringed instrument (cogn. יָגַן to pound), 1Sa 16:16, 17 1Sa 16:17, 18 1Sa 16:18, 23 1Sa 16:23 2Ki 3:15 Psa 33:3 Isa 23:16 (Ch. id.).

Derived nouns, נְגִינָה, מַנְגִּינָה [and in Thes. גַּת (for גֶּנֶת)].
